description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes a job named mirror:status in the mirror_status stage. The job extends the .with-bundle and .common-ci-tokens templates, runs on the default Docker image and executes the shell command `bundle exec rake 'mirror:status'`. It should only run when the pipeline source is pipeline, web, or trigger and the variable MIRROR_STATUS is set to "true" (as defined by the rule). No caches, artifacts, or services are defined.
